context_field-name: Use slash-separated path segments. Each segment may contain Latin letters (A-Z, a-z), numbers (0-9), and special characters: ., -, _. Maximum segment length is 255 characters.
context_shards-write-quota: The maximum allowed write speed per partition. [Read more](https://ydb.tech/docs/en/concepts/datamodel/topic#partitioning) about partition throughput
context_throughput-info: Total throughput: up to {{speed}} (calculated using the formula: partition throughput * number of partitions)
context_throughput-info-range: Total throughput: from {{from}} to {{to}} (calculated using the formula: partition throughput * number of partitions)
context_auto-partitioning: Dynamic scaling of the topic depending on the write speed. [Documentation](https://ydb.tech/docs/en/concepts/datamodel/topic#autopartitioning)
context_shards-info: The number of shards cannot be reduced
context_auto-partitioning-stabilization-: The period of time after a load change when the number of partitions will change
context_auto-partitioning-up-utilization: The threshold at which the number of partitions increases
confirm_auto-partitioning-message: The Kafka protocol does not support topic autopartitioning. If you enable autopartitioning, you will not be able to work with the topics you create using the Kafka protocol. You can not disabling autopartitioning for a specific topic.
error_name-regex: Use slash-separated path segments. Each segment may contain Latin letters (A-Z, a-z), numbers (0-9), and special characters: ., -, _. Maximum segment length is 255 characters.
error_min-length: Value can't be shorter than {{count}} characters
error_max-length: Value can't be longer than {{count}} characters
error_min-number: Value must be an integer no less than {{count}}
error_max-number: Value must not be greater than {{count}}
error_less-than-number: This value must be an integer less than {{count}}
error_more-than-number: This value must be an integer greater than {{count}}
